_comment: Auto-trigger config for sanctum automation tools. Operator 2026-05-24T21:32Z: 'most if not all of these tools to be automatic as to if and when the agent needs or wants to use them'. RKOJ-ELENO :: 2026-05-24. Cron-style triggers fire via SinisterToolAutotrigger scheduled task; event-style triggers fire via hooks (next iter).

triggers.purpose: boot bringup: Docker wait + bot warm + sweeps
weekly decay scan -> surface most-stale brain entries to operator queue
triggers.post_action: append top 5 to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE.md as 'brain entries past half-life'

triggers.purpose: daily refresh of _INDEX-DECAY-SCORES.md sidecar (read by operator/agents for at-a-glance entry health)
weekly contradict audit -> flag STAGNANT lanes
triggers.post_action: if any lane STAGNANT, push fleet-update priority=normal

triggers.purpose: route processed drop-link entries to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE for review
show round-robin status on every spawn
detect sibling agents in same/similar project; inject brief into cold-start phrase

queued_for_event_hooks_next_iter.purpose: auto-prompt for pivot row when a new plan is written; drives project growth

queued_for_event_hooks_next_iter.trigger_event: brain entry referenced via Composes-with in another new entry
queued_for_event_hooks_next_iter.purpose: auto-reinforce brain entries cited by new doctrines
